arts.ttl: Kounde dropped for Barca's clash with Rayo after being late again
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has long made it clear how important he views punctuality and has already dropped Kounde and Inaki Pena this season for poor time-keeping. According to Gerard Romero, Kounde was late for Flick's pre-match talk and has been sanctioned again.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make decision on Nico Williams transfer pursuit
arts.sum: Barcelona have been long-term admirers of Athletic Club's Nico Williams but weren't able to agree deal in last year's summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star dropped from XI vs Rayo as punishment from Hansi Flick
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was dropped from the club’s latest line-up as punishment for being late. That’s according to Barca insider Gerard…

arts.ttl: Watch: Ex-Barcelona star Neymar’s silky run & first goal since return to Santos
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. enjoyed an outing to remember over the weekend. This came as the 33-year-old got his goalscoring account up and running following his return to boyhood…

arts.ttl: Barcelona left with free run at leading summer transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been left with a clear path to the signing of Bayer Leverkusen star Jonathan Tah. This comes amid confirmation that chief rivals Bayern Munich have…

arts.ttl: Official: Youngster steps in as Barcelona name XI to face Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: The group of players set to be depended on by La Liga giants Barcelona to get the better of Rayo Vallecano this evening has been unveiled. Barcelona are of course…

arts.ttl: Neymar’s father speaks out amid Barcelona return links
arts.sum: The father of ex-Barcelona star Neymar Jr. has indirectly shut down rumours surrounding a potential return to the Camp Nou in the summer. The name of wide-man Neymar has of…

arts.ttl: Barcelona aiming to sell Premier League target to fund Jonathan Tah signing
arts.sum: Barcelona's pursuit of Jonathan Tah continues and is likely to have a knock-on effect for one of their most high-profile defenders.

Barcelona could climb to the top of the La Liga table if they can continue their impressive form of late. Hansi Flick's side have won their last three games in the league, including a 7-1 victory over...

arts.ttl: New details emerge of Ronald Araújo’s Barcelona release clause
arts.sum: It’s been almost a month since Uruguayan centre-back Ronald Araújo signed his new Barcelona contract, and plenty of talk has been had around his new release clause at the club.…
